name: herdr-agent-org-grok
description: Grok agent-org on Herdr substrate. Orchestrator/planner/herdr-worker/replacer/org-audit skills + filesystem board CLI. Dispatches workers via herdr agent start in real panes; waits via herdr agent wait; no Solo MCP required. L16 makes lane trees MCP-first (skyline_workspace_create with an absolute from_path, CLI skyrift second, git worktree last) and L17 makes dispatch effort explicit, with dispatch-worker appending --effort medium for grok and refusing an upgrade without --upgrade-reason (marketplace#32). Session discipline hooks (lane mark, conduct refresh, stop gate) use exact ${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT} load-time paths. Requires HERDR_ENV=1 and herdr >= 0.7.
